author: OpenAI
description: Adaptive, non-destructive, channel-aware server reconciler. It checks effective permissions in each category/channel and provides exact 403 diagnostics.
short: Audit, reconcile, optimize, and launch an existing Discord server.
install_msg: Adaptive v2.2 loaded. Run `[p]deche diagnose`, `[p]deche audit`, then `[p]deche reconcile CONFIRM`. A 403 now reports the exact blocked operation.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store end-user data.
